file_write.scope: scripts/render-report.py may create the three declared report artifacts under the user-selected local output directory; scripts/sanitize-package.py may rewrite only the explicitly selected distribution ZIP.
file_write.reason: The skill must write the validated offline report bundle and remove private authoring evidence from its selected distribution archive; neither script modifies source systems or makes network requests.

target_enforcement.openai: Metadata permission contract; execution still follows the active workspace file policy.
target_enforcement.claude: Adapter permission metadata plus the explicit local output-directory scope.
target_enforcement.generic: Adapter permission metadata plus the explicit local output-directory scope.
target_enforcement.vscode: Workspace trust plus adapter permission metadata and the explicit local output-directory scope.
